Definition: Integer city identifier used for joins and grouped cross-validation.
Broad climate grouping label for the city.
Cell identifier within the city grid.
NLCD impervious percentage for the cell.
NLCD land-cover class code for the cell.
Distance from the cell to the nearest hydro feature in meters.
Median May-August NDVI derived from AppEEARS MODIS/Terra MOD13A1.061 inputs.
Median May-August 2023 daytime land surface temperature derived from ECOSTRESS/AppEEARS inputs.
Number of valid ECOSTRESS observations contributing to the cell-level LST summary.
Binary indicator for whether the cell falls in the within-city top 10% of valid LST values.
Share of nearby 30 m cells within an approximately 270 m neighborhood in NLCD forest classes 41/42/43.
Share of nearby 30 m cells within an approximately 270 m neighborhood in selected NLCD vegetated classes.
Neighborhood mean NLCD impervious percentage within an approximately 270 m window.
